title: Working Directory Management: fchdir() and getcwd()
description: A flowchart showing how fchdir() changes the current working directory using a file descriptor, and how getcwd() retrieves the absolute pathname of the current directory.
relationships: Process calls open() on directory to get fd
Process calls fchdir(fd) to change CWD
Kernel updates process's current working directory pointer
Process calls getcwd() to retrieve absolute path
Kernel resolves path from current directory to root
Pathname is stored in user-provided buffer
